description: Failure-signature → finding/issue index maintained by /lmv-autodev. Each failure_signature maps a regex over wkmigrate not_translatable warning messages to a known wkmigrate weakness. lmv_issue is the local lmv gh issue (filled in by Phase 1.5 step 5 once filed). upstream_issues are references to ghanse/wkmigrate (informational only — never auto-filed). last_tested records the wkmigrate ref the signature was last validated against.

last_session.corpus: golden_sets/expressions.json (200 pairs, wrapped as SetVariable, FLAT input shape)
last_session.harvest_outcome: 0 not_translatable entries from W-1..W-6 signatures; corpus exhausted on this wkmigrate ref

math_on_params.description: Math expressions over pipeline().parameters.X requiring type coercion

deep_nesting.description: Pipeline DAGs with deep activity nesting; can hit PipelineAdapter recursion

failure_signatures.title: [expressions] Map @concat(a, b, ...) to Python f-string / str concatenation (sub-finding of wkmigrate#27)

last_tested.result: 34/34 resolved, 34/34 byte-match expected_python, 0 not_translatable, 0 W-1 cluster hits
last_tested.verified_via_journey: First lands in pr/27-1-expression-parser@be9e3a5 (47-fn Python registry includes concat as Tier-1)

failure_signatures.fix_sketch: Add a PythonEmitter mapping for `concat` in the parsers/ module, producing either a string-concat chain or an f-string.

failure_signatures.title: [expressions] Resolve @pipeline().parameters.X in non-notebook activities (generalization of wkmigrate#55)

last_tested.corpus: golden_sets/expressions.json (200 pairs, all wrapped as SetVariable)
last_tested.result: Not exercised — corpus uses literal expressions only, never @pipeline().parameters.X. Need a stratified corpus that injects parameter references in SetVariable/IfCondition/Copy contexts. See L-F4 / L-F5.

failure_signatures.fix_sketch: Generalize the #55 fix beyond notebook activities. SetVariable, IfCondition predicates, and Copy source paths all need pipeline().parameters.X → {{job.parameters.X}} substitution.

failure_signatures.title: [expressions] Type coercion for @add/@mul/@sub/@div/@mod on parameters (dbutils.widgets.get returns strings)

last_tested.result: Math literals resolve fully (34/34 byte-match), but the corpus contains no @pipeline().parameters.X references inside math contexts. Type-coercion path is unexercised. Need adversarial fixtures injecting parameter references.

failure_signatures.fix_sketch: Track the declared parameter type from the pipeline spec; when emitting a pipeline().parameters.X reference inside a math context, wrap with the appropriate coercion (int/float).

failure_signatures.title: [expressions] Support @activity('Lookup').output.firstRow.X chaining in downstream activities
upstream_issues: ghanse/wkmigrate#27 (Lookup adoption deferred to proposed wkmigrate#28)

last_tested.result: Not exercised — corpus has no multi-activity chains and never wraps in Lookup. wkmigrate's Lookup translator adoption is explicitly deferred per dev/pr-strategy-issue-27.md (proposed issue #28). Need a multi-activity corpus to probe.

failure_signatures.fix_sketch: Translate Lookup activities into a notebook cell that assigns its result to a task-value; downstream references resolve via dbutils.jobs.taskValues.get(taskKey='Lookup', key='firstRow').

failure_signatures.title: [safety] Cycle detection in PipelineAdapter recursive enrichment

last_tested.corpus: golden_sets/expressions.json (single-activity SetVariable wrapper, no Execute Pipeline)
last_tested.result: Not exercised — corpus has no Execute Pipeline activities or recursive structure. Need a corpus with self-referencing or circular pipelines to trigger the recursion path.

failure_signatures.fix_sketch: Thread a `visited: set[str]` through PipelineAdapter recursive calls; raise NotTranslatableWarning + UnsupportedValue on revisit.

failure_signatures.title: [observability] Emit structured failure_mode tags on NotTranslatableWarning payloads

last_tested.result: Not directly testable — this is a wkmigrate enhancement, not a failure signature. The 200-pair corpus produced 0 not_translatable warnings of any kind, so structured tags would have nothing to attach to. The enhancement is still valid for adversarial corpora that DO produce warnings.

failure_signatures.fix_sketch: Extend NotTranslatableWarning with a `failure_mode` field, one of: function_not_mapped, type_coercion_missing, nesting_depth_exceeded, parameter_reference_dropped, activity_output_chain_unresolved, unsupported_activity_type.

notes: lmv_issue is null until /lmv-autodev Phase 1.5 step 5 files the issue.
upstream_issues are informational. /lmv-autodev does NOT auto-file in ghanse/wkmigrate.
When a new failure cluster is harvested in Phase 1.5 and matches no signature, /lmv-autodev appends a new entry here (and commits) before drafting the lmv issue.
regex patterns are matched against the `message` field of `not_translatable` entries from the lmv adapter.
